title: nephrodium villosum var. subincisum
intro: Nephrodium villosum var. subincisum, also known as the subincised leathery fern, is a plant species within the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and kidney stones. The health benefits of Nephrodium villosum var. subincisum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various urinary tract issues and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
